query:
_index=sumologic_audit_events _SourceCategory=accessKeys (AccessKeyCreated OR AccessKeyDeleted OR AccessKeyUpdated)
| json field=_raw "operator.email" as user
| where user matches "{{user}}"
| json field=_raw "operator.sourceIp" as ip
| json field=_raw "operator.interface" as interface
| json "eventName", "accessId", "accessKey.enabled", "to.enabled" as EventName, AccessId, IsActive, IsActiveUpdated nodrop
| if(isNull(IsActive), if(isNull(IsActiveUpdated), "-", IsActiveUpdated) ,IsActive) as IsActive
| where EventName in 
("AccessKeyCreated","AccessKeyDeleted","AccessKeyUpdated") 
| concat(substring(AccessId,0,4),"****",substring(AccessId,8,13)) as id
| geoip ip
| lookup asn,organization from asn://default on ip=ip
| trim(concat(asn,"_",organization," ",country_name," ",city)) as asn_geo
| if (asn_geo matches /{{expected_asn_geo_regex}}/,"normal","exception") as location
| where location matches "{{show_asn_geo}}"

| count by _messagetime,eventname,id,isactive,user,interface,ip,asn_geo,location


// summarize

queryParameters.name: expected_asn_geo_regex
queryParameters.description: regular expression for expected asn geo strings

sources.dashboardName: Sumo Logic Login and API Activity
rowContext: API Access Activity and Configuration Changes

variables.name: expected_asn_geo_regex
variables.values: regular expression for expected asn geo strings
